evals.prompt: Add a persona picker to my pomodoro timer app at apps/pomodoro-timer/. Let me choose between different AI coaching styles before I start a session — at least a 'motivational' and a 'strict' option. The selected persona should influence the encouragement message the AI gives when I finish a session.
evals.expected_output: src/persona.js created with getPersonas/requestPersonaAccess helpers; webai.js updated with ...rest spread; App.jsx has a persona selector UI; streamCompletion calls include personaType or personaId; app rebuilds successfully.

assertions.name: persona_js_created
assertions.description: src/persona.js exists with getPersonas or requestPersonaAccess

assertions.name: webai_js_rest_spread
assertions.description: webai.js streamCompletion spreads ...rest into host.request so personaType is not dropped

assertions.name: persona_option_passed
assertions.description: App.jsx passes personaType or personaId to streamCompletion

assertions.name: picker_ui_present
assertions.description: App.jsx has a selector, dropdown, or button for persona choice
